Steam Boost for Tough Wrinkles: For heavily wrinkled or thicker fabrics, the steam boost function delivers an extra burst of steam, effectively smoothing out even the most challenging creases and offering you professional-level ironing results.

name: Msi Mag 346cq 34 Inch Monitor
description:
Experience trusted performance with Kapruka’s affordable and reliable electronics — delivered anywhere in Sri Lanka.
MSI MAG 346CQ Gaming Monitor

The MSI MAG 346CQ gaming monitor is designed for gamers who demand immersive visuals, ultra-smooth performance, and a cinematic ultrawide experience. Featuring a 34-inch curved display with a 1500R curvature and UWQHD resolution (3440 1440), this monitor expands your field of view and pulls you deeper into every game, movie, and creative task.

The 21:9 ultrawide aspect ratio gives you a significant advantage in gaming by displaying more of the environment on screen, allowing better situational awareness in competitive titles and a more immersive experience in open-world and racing games. Combined with the large screen size, the MSI MAG 346CQ is also ideal for productivity, multitasking, and content creation.

Performance is where the MSI MAG 346CQ truly stands out. With an ultra-fast refresh rate of up to 180Hz and a 1ms response time (MPRT), the monitor delivers exceptionally smooth motion and reduced motion blur. Fast-paced scenes remain sharp and responsive, giving gamers precise control and a clear edge in competitive gameplay.

To ensure a tear-free and fluid gaming experience, the monitor supports AMD FreeSync Premium, synchronizing the display refresh rate with your GPU to eliminate screen tearing and stuttering. The MSI MAG 346CQ is also console-ready, supporting VRR on PS5 and Xbox, making it a versatile choice for both PC and console gamers.

The high-quality VA panel delivers outstanding contrast with a 4000:1 contrast ratio, producing deep blacks and excellent shadow detail. With wide color coverage reaching 100 sRGB, games and multimedia content appear vibrant and natural. The HDR Ready support further enhances brightness and contrast, providing more realistic and dynamic visuals.

Designed with a frameless design, the MSI MAG 346CQ looks modern and clean, fitting perfectly into any gaming setup. Practical features such as tilt adjustment, VESA mounting support, and an internal power board help keep your desk organized while allowing flexible installation options. Additional features like PIPPBP support make this ultrawide monitor even more versatile for multitasking users.

03 Years warranty
Black colour

name: Msi Mag 345cqr E2 34inch Va 180hz Monitor
description:
Kapruka Electronics offers the perfect mix of quality, reliability, and price — with nationwide delivery in Sri Lanka.
This 34-inch ultrawide monitor features a VA panel with a 3440 x 1440 (UWQHD) resolution and a 1500R curvature, designed to provide an immersive viewing experience with a 21:9 aspect ratio. It offers a smooth gaming performance with a 180Hz refresh rate (via DisplayPort) and a 1ms (MPRT) response time, supported by Adaptive-Sync technology to prevent screen tearing. The display is capable of producing 1.07 billion colors (8-bit FRC) and covers 95 of the DCI-P3 color gamut, ensuring vibrant visuals with a solid 3000:1 native contrast ratio and HDR Ready support.

For connectivity, the monitor includes one DisplayPort 1.4a and two HDMI 2.0b ports, though it is important to note that the HDMI ports are capped at a 100Hz refresh rate at full resolution. The physical design is frameless and highly adjustable, allowing for tilt, swivel, height, and minor pivot adjustments to suit your ergonomic needs. It also supports PIPPBP functions for multitasking and is compatible with 75 x 75 mm VESA mounts. The unit is powered by an external adapter and includes an anti-glare surface treatment to maintain visibility in various lighting conditions.

03 Years warranty
Black colour

name: Msi Mag 491cqpx Qd Oled 49 Inch 240hz Monitor
description:
Reliable technology. Affordable prices. Kapruka Electronics delivers top electronics across Sri Lanka.
This 49-inch curved monitor features a high-performance QD-OLED panel with a 5120 x 1440 (DQHD) resolution and an expansive 32:9 aspect ratio, providing a massive active display area of 1196.7 mm by 339.2 mm. Designed for elite speed, it boasts a 240Hz refresh rate and an incredibly low 0.03ms (GtG) response time, complemented by G-Sync compatibility for smooth, tear-free visuals. The screen`s 1800R curvature and anti-reflection surface treatment enhance immersion, while its color performance is exceptional, covering 99 of the DCI-P3 gamut and supporting 1.07 billion colors. For high dynamic range content, it meets the DisplayHDR True Black 400 standard, reaching a peak brightness of 1000 nits and a staggering 1,500,000:1 contrast ratio.

Connectivity is highly versatile, including two HDMI 2.1 ports, one DisplayPort 1.4a, and a USB Type-C port that supports DisplayPort Alt Mode and 98W Power Delivery. It also functions as a productivity hub with a built-in KVM switch, PiPPbP support, and several USB 2.0 ports. The physical build is robust yet adjustable, offering height, swivel, and tilt modifications, along with 100 x 100 mm VESA mounting compatibility. Weighing 10.6 kg with the stand, the unit includes all necessary cables for HDMI, DisplayPort, and USB, ensuring it is ready for high-end gaming or intensive multitasking right out of the box.

03 Years warranty
Black colour

name: Msi Mag Forge 320l Brand New Black Gaming Casing
description:
From smartphones to kitchen appliances, Kapruka Electronics offers trusted quality and islandwide delivery at great prices.
The MSI MAG Forge 320L is a versatile Mid Tower Gaming Case designed to accommodate a wide range of builds, supporting everything from Mini-ITX to E-ATX motherboards. Its aesthetic is defined by a dual-panel tempered glass design, offering a clear view of your internal components and any installed lighting. For cooling performance, it features a flexible layout with support for up to three 120mm fans at the front and two at the top, along with compatibility for liquid cooling radiatorsup to 360mm in the front and 240mm on the top panel.

Internally, the case is quite spacious, providing enough clearance for GPUs up to 370mm in length and CPU air coolers up to 170mm in height. Storage is handled by a dedicated drive bay system that fits two 3.5 HDDs and two 2.5 SSDs. The front IO is modern and well-equipped, featuring a USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C port alongside two Type-A ports and standard HD audio jacks. Physically, the case measures approximately 460 220 500 mm and has a sturdy gross weight of about 8.2kg, making it a substantial yet manageable foundation for a high-performance gaming rig.


06 Months warranty

The Havit PJ219 PRO is a versatile and compact smart projector designed to deliver an immersive viewing experience for home entertainment, gaming, and presentations.

With a native Full HD resolution of 1920x1080 and support for 4K input, it ensures sharp and vibrant visuals.

The projector boasts a brightness of 8500 lumens (350 ANSI lumens) and a contrast ratio of 1500:1, providing clear images even in moderately lit environments.

Equipped with Android TV 9.0, the PJ219 PRO offers seamless access to popular streaming services like Netflix, YouTube, and Disney, eliminating the need for external devices.

Its user-friendly interface supports 23 languages, which includes English, Japanese, Mandarin and more.

The projector features semi-auto focus and keystone correction, ensuring a properly aligned image without manual adjustments.

Its dynamic RGB lighting adds a modern aesthetic touch, enhancing the ambiance during use.

The PJ219 PRO adapts to any space, delivering crisp images from a compact 43-inch display to a cinematic 220-inch screen.

This projector has a projection distance ranging from 1.5m to 6.9m making it suitable for a wide range living spaces.

Its built-in 5W stereo speakers deliver good audio quality, while the 40,000-hour lamp life ensures long-term reliability.

Includes HDMI, USB Type-A, Type C, AV, and 3.5mm audio jack for versatile input sources.

description:
From smartphones to kitchen appliances, Kapruka Electronics offers trusted quality and islandwide delivery at great prices.


Wireless Magnetic - This charger power ups your phone without tangled wires compromising its style.

This Magnetic Wireless Charger comes with its own 3ft long cable that will not block your hands when playing games, watching videos, or video chatting while charging. It is equipped with 15W of flash charging power that enables your phone to be charged quickly. With a built-in high-grade Qi wireless charging smart chip, this charger can recognise your phone intelligently and charge fast. It is 100% compatible with the newest iPhone 15, 14, 13, 12 and other series with magnetic attachment.

3ft long cable for long range charging.

15W fast charging power enables your phone.

Built-in high-grade Qi wireless charging smart chip, to recognise your phone intelligently.

100% compatible with the latest iPhone 15, 14, 13, 12, and other series.

Specifications: -

Colour: white

Finish: matt

Materials: plastic, metal

Power: 15W

Input: 5V

Output: 5V

Cable: USB-C type

Cable Length: 3 feet

Security Protection

Overcurrent

Overvoltage

Over temperature

Short circuit

Power

Under voltage

Overcharge

Foreign body detection

Magnetic field

Charging smart chip.

Wireless.

Magnetic attachment.

Set up your MagSafe Charger

Connect the USB-C connector on your MagSafe Charger to a recommended 20 watt (W) or greater Apple USB-C power adapter or compatible third-party USB-C adapter. You can also connect to a USB-C port on a Mac or PC.

Place your MagSafe Charger face up as shown on a flat surface, clear of any metal objects or other foreign material.

Place your iPhone on your MagSafe Charger.

Get up to 15W faster wireless charging

The MagSafe Charger is designed to quickly and safely wirelessly charge your iPhone. The system intelligently adapts to conditions to optimise charging your iPhone at up to 15W of peak power delivery for faster wireless charging. The actual power delivered to the iPhone will vary depending on the wattage of the power adapter and system conditions. For iPhone 13 mini and iPhone 12 mini, the MagSafe Charger delivers up to 12W of peak power delivery.

It`s important to plug into a power source before placing your iPhone on the MagSafe Charger. This allows MagSafe to verify it`s safe to deliver maximum power. If you happen to place your iPhone on the MagSafe Charger before plugging into a power source, simply remove your iPhone from the MagSafe Charger, wait three seconds, and then put it back on to resume maximum power delivery.

The MagSafe Charger is designed to negotiate the max power up to 9 volt (V) and 3 amp (A) with a USB PD-compatible power adapter. MagSafe will dynamically optimise power delivered to the iPhone. The power delivered to your iPhone at any moment will vary depending on various factors, including temperature and system activity.

All power adapters have different ratings for amount and rate of power delivery. The MagSafe Charger requires the following ratings to deliver faster wireless charging.

description:

2-mic perfect calls with beamforming technology
Adaptive Noise Cancelling

Spatial Sound

Hi-Res JBL Pure Bass Sound plus Spatial Sound

JBL Pure Bass Sound adds depth, power, and punch to everything you hear. Custom 40mm drivers deliver rich, dynamic audio whether youre locking in at work or losing yourself in a playlist. Our proprietary JBL Spatial Sound technology puts you in the middle of your music as sound flows naturally from every direction, on any device. When you want even more detail and clarity, enjoy Hi-Res audio using the included USB-C to 3.5mm audio cable.

Adaptive Noise Cancelling with Smart Ambient

Adaptive Noise Cancelling automatically adjusts to tune out the distractions, whether you`re deep into your work or getting into the groove. Use Ambient Aware and TalkThru to hear whats happening around you or jump into conversations without taking off your headphones. Manage it all easily through the JBL Headphones app.

2-mic perfect calls with beamforming technology

Two beamforming mics on each earcup precisely capture your speech without background noise, while our latest noise reduction technology filters out ambient sound in even the busiest environments. So whether youre on a teleconference in a busy caf or catching up with a friend during your commute, your voice comes through loud and clear.

Up to 76 hours of battery life, plus speed charge

With up to 76 hours of battery life, your JBL Tune 780NC headphones will outlast your longest playlist. Need a boost` A 5-minute speed charge gives you another 5 hours of playtime. And when its time for a full recharge, youll be back to 100 in about two hours.

With ANC and Bluetooth off. Expect up to 50 hours with them on.

Charging cable not included

Multi-point connection with Bluetooth 6.0

Pair your headphones with two Bluetooth devices and then switch effortlessly from one to the other. Stream a movie from your tablet in the airport lounge and still hear boarding updates from your phone. Thanks to Bluetooth 6.0 enjoy high-quality streaming with lower power use and reduced latency. So your audio stays perfectly in sync whether youre on a video call or watching a movie.

Lightweight, comfortable, and foldable

Stay comfortable no matter how long you listen, thanks to the soft over-ear cups and lightweight padded headband. And when its time to move on, your JBL Tune 780NC fold flat, so they fit effortlessly into your everyday carry.

Customize your sound with the JBL Headphones app

Use the JBL Headphones app to set up Personi-Fi 3.0, shaping your music to match your hearing profile. Customize the EQ, or choose one of the presets ones, control your Smart Ambient settings, and more.

Fast Pair by Google Swift Pair by Microsoft

Pairing on Android or Windows 1011 couldnt be easier. Just power on your JBL Tune 780NC headphones and follow the prompt. No menus, no delaysjust seamless listening.

Display and Controls


LED Monitor: A digital screen is integrated into the center of the handlebars to display current speed, battery life, and operating status.
Power Button: The scooter is turned on with a long press of the menu button.
Braking: It features a hand-operated brake lever on the left handlebar for quick and safe stopping.

Headlight: An integrated front LED light provides illumination for riding in dark environments.
Tires: The scooter uses 10-inch wheels (featuring red reflector accents on the wheel hubs) designed to safely navigate various terrains, including speed bumps and sandy paths.
Deck and Portability


Foot Deck: The standing deck features a widened design with a silicone grip surface for improved comfort and stability while riding.
Folding Mechanism: The steering column can be quickly folded down and locked into place, making it compact enough to fit into a standard car trunk for easy transport.
Riding Mechanics and Smart Features


Kick-to-Start: As a safety feature, the motor requires the rider to manually push off (slide) to get the scooter moving before the electric throttle will engage.
Speed Modes: The scooter features three distinct speed settings:
First Mode: 6 KMH
Second Mode: 15 KMH
Third Mode: 25 KMH
Cruise Control: If the rider maintains a stable speed for 10 seconds, the scooter will automatically enter a cruising mode.
App Connectivity: The scooter connects to a mobile smartphone app via Bluetooth, allowing the user to view intelligent diagnostics, battery levels, and adjust settings directly from their phone.

name: Uni Homeware 16 Inch Stand Fan El1600
description:
Kapruka Electronics delivers dependable, top-grade electronics at budget-friendly prices to every corner of Sri Lanka.


16-inch stand fan for effective room cooling
Adjustable height and tilt for customized airflow
Multiple speed settings for flexible comfort
Oscillation function for wide air distribution
Stable base for safe and steady operation
Suitable for home and office use
01 Year Warranty
The Uni Homeware 16 Inch Stand Fan EL1600 is a reliable and efficient cooling solution designed to deliver consistent airflow and everyday comfort for homes and offices. Built to meet daily cooling needs, this stand fan combines effective air circulation, user-friendly controls, and a sturdy structure, making it an ideal choice for warm climates and year-round ventilation. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, office, or dining area, this fan provides dependable cooling performance with minimal effort.

At the heart of the Uni Homeware Stand Fan is a powerful motor engineered to deliver strong and steady airflow. The 16-inch fan blades are designed to move air efficiently across the room, helping maintain a cool and comfortable environment even during hot and humid conditions. The balanced blade design ensures smooth operation while distributing air evenly, reducing stuffiness and improving overall air circulation.

The 16 Inch Stand Fan is designed with adjustable height functionality, allowing users to customize airflow direction according to their needs. This feature ensures that cool air reaches the desired area, whether you are seated, standing, or resting. Combined with its oscillation function, the fan distributes air across a wider area, making it suitable for shared spaces and family use.

Durability is a key feature of the Uni Homeware EL1600 Fan. The sturdy base provides excellent stability, preventing wobbling during operation. The fans protective grille is designed to ensure safety while allowing unrestricted airflow. High-quality materials used in the construction contribute to long-term reliability, making the fan suitable for daily use throughout the year.

Ease of use is central to the design of this Adjustable Stand Fan. Simple control knobs allow users to select from multiple speed settings, giving control over airflow intensity. Whether you need a gentle breeze for relaxation or stronger airflow for cooling larger spaces, the fan adapts easily to different comfort preferences. The intuitive controls make it suitable for users of all ages.

The fans oscillation feature enhances cooling efficiency by spreading airflow evenly throughout the room. This prevents concentrated airflow in one direction and ensures consistent cooling across the space. The tilt-adjustable fan head further improves flexibility, allowing precise control over air direction for personalized comfort.

Noise control is another advantage of the Home Cooling Fan. The motor and blade design work together to deliver effective airflow while maintaining relatively quiet operation. This makes the fan suitable for bedrooms, offices, and study areas where minimal noise is important for rest or concentration.

Maintenance is simple and hassle-free. The fans grille can be cleaned easily to remove dust buildup, helping maintain airflow efficiency and hygiene. Its durable construction ensures long-term performance with minimal upkeep, making it a practical choice for busy households.

Energy efficiency is an important benefit of the Uni Homeware 16 Inch Stand Fan EL1600. The fan provides effective cooling while consuming moderate electricity, making it an economical alternative to air conditioning. This balance of performance and efficiency helps reduce energy costs while maintaining comfort during warmer months.

The fans clean and practical design allows it to blend seamlessly into various interior settings. Its neutral appearance complements modern and traditional spaces alike, making it a versatile addition to home or office environments. The lightweight structure allows easy repositioning, giving users flexibility to move the fan as needed.

Overall, the Uni Homeware 16 Inch Stand Fan EL1600 delivers reliable cooling performance, adjustable comfort, and durable construction. With its strong airflow, oscillation function, adjustable height, and easy operation, it meets the essential cooling needs of everyday life. Suitable for homes, offices, and shared spaces, this stand fan offers a dependable and cost-effective solution for staying cool and comfortable.

Make sure the disk is out of running before cutting off the power or unplugging the cable;

How to use :

2. Use on clean, dry skin, pull skin tight and move in small, circular motions
* It is normal for hair removal head to become warm with use

For optimal results :

* Use on clean and completely dry skin with no cream or cosmetic residue
* Pull skin tight and move in small, circular motions
* If unit begins to slow down, clean head of hair residue
* If unit is still running slow, change battery
* It is normal for skin to appear red immediately after use due to pressure and friction applied
